{% for section in sidebar %}
§ {% if loop.index < 10 %}0{% endif %}{{ loop.index }} {{ section.title }} + {% if section.items | length > 0 %}
    {% for item in section.items %}
  • {{ item.title }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% for subsection in section.subsections %}
{{ subsection.title }} + {% if subsection.items | length > 0 %}
    {% for item in subsection.items %}
  • {{ item.title }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% for sub2 in subsection.subsubsections %}
{{ sub2.title }} +
    {% for item in sub2.items %}
  • {{ item.title }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
